GPS TOOLBOX
GHASP: a Galileo HAS parser
D. Borio1 · M. Susi1 · C. Gioia2
Received: 2 February 2023 / Accepted: 3 August 2023 / Published online: 5 September 2023
© The Author(s) 2023
Abstract
Galileo High Accuracy Service (HAS) corrections are broadcast through the E6B signal using a high-parity vertical Reed-
Solomon encoding scheme, which reduces message recovery time and improves transmission reliability. To recover HAS
corrections, it is thus necessary to invert the encoding process and interpret the decoded bits. In or
